name: Curse of the Clumsy
entries: When a creature cursed by your Evil Eye moves at least 5 feet on its turn, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} and spend 3 Jinx Points to cause the creature to have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and have its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} reduced to 0 until the end of its turn.
After you use this Misfortune, the creature is no longer cursed by your Evil Eye.
